name: @bigdreamsweb3/wordbin
description: WordBin – Encode words & short text into tiny, reversible binary for storage, URLs, IoT, QR codes, metadata, blockchain, or Web3 apps.
author: Agbaka Daniel Ugonna <99cratson@gmail.com>

scripts.build:dict:all: npm run build:dict:v1 && npm run build:dict:v2
scripts.release:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm run version:major && npm run build && npm publish --access public
scripts.git-commit-push: git diff-index --quiet HEAD || (git add . && git commit -m "Something just got updated!" --allow-empty && git push origin main)
scripts.git-commit-push-force: git add . && git commit -m "Something just got updated!" --no-verify --allow-empty && git push origin main --force
